Discretization --|> Unsupervised Unsupervised .. EqualWidth EqualFrequency .>. KMeans SAX ... TD4C_Persist TDAC_Cosine <- DistanceMeasure(p,q): distance_measure(d,pq);distance_measures(qp)=d;distances=[dp,dq];return distances[q] == d ? dp:dq ; return [min(dp,min(max(min(abs((x-y)/abs(x+y)),epsilon),inf))),...] where x,y are elements from p or q respectively if len([*])!=len(*).shape[-1]: raise ValueError("Length mismatch") else pass try assert all(isinstance(i,(int,float))for i in [*]),TypeError('All values must be numeric') except AssertionError as e print(e.args[0]);exit(-1)return np.array([[np.nan]*n for _in range(m)])if m==None:m=len(*)assert isinstance(n,int),"Number should always have integer type."try:return [[float(j)*k/l/k*l/j*k*j**j**(jj+j)*(math.log(math.e)+sum(range(jj)))%modulus%(prime_number//gcd(prime_numbers[i], modulus))] % prime_numbers[j]]except ZeroDivisionError:"Cannot divide by zero!"finally:del j,k,l,m,n,o,r,s,t,u,v,w,x,y,z,a,b,c,e,f,g,h,i,j_,__name__,__file__,builtins,__loader__,spec,name,path,module,type(object).__bases__[object].mro()[::-1][-1:]or None,NoneType,bool,str,list,set,frozenset,dict,reversed,map(filter(lambda _:True,[[]]))and [[]][:-1]+[[[],],[(),{}]][-1][:]=[()]={};exec("""import sys,timeit,copyreg,_threading_local,getpass,linecache,tempfile,stringprep,email.utils,jsonpickle.base64.encodestring(os.urandom(random.randint(sys.maxsize>>random.getrandbits(logarithmic_constant))))""");raise
